entry.title: Re: Urgent: MDK V24.11 App Crashing on Android Devices

entry.title: The Trace – Watching Object Dependencies at Work
entry.content:
Dependencies in SAP AVC (Advanced Variant Configuration) models can become quite complex and, thus, confusing. In this case, it’s beneficial to check what’s happening: The trace helps you track which dependencies are executed, when, and with which result. The user’s input and its effects are also visible here.

One caveat upfront: As helpful as the trace is to gain insights into the valuation process, it also impairs performance. So, when you want the dependency machinery to work fast, you better turn off the trace.

This blog post will help you familiarize yourself with the trace feature. After general remarks on its use, we outline an example to illustrate what’s inside the trace log. The important Trace Filters feature is discussed separately, followed by the option to navigate directly to dependencies or objects starting from a trace entry.

 

Use

The trace can be activated in the right pane next to the valuation screen of the simulation UI (the inspector panel). If you don’t see the inspector panel, use the “Toggle Inspector Panel” button at the top right.

 

 

 

Switch from Inspector to Trace and turn on the trace when you’re ready to trace the model’s dependencies.

Use the Search window to find trace entries in large trace logs quickly. The search only works with the technical names of the objects, so you should switch them on in the settings (cogwheel at the top right). The recommendation is to use “Both” (technical name and description).

The following example is supposed to give you an idea of how the trace works and how to read the entries.

 

Example: Check the Gripper

We want to test the model of a robot arm that can pick and drop things. Depending on the environment (“controlled” or “harsh”) and the objects to handle (characteristic “Delicate Parts Handling” can have values “Yes” or “No”), a suitable gripper has to be selected: The “Gripper Technology” can be “Mechanical Gripper” or “Vacuum Gripper.”

It is also possible to choose no value, which can’t be used for the gripper technology, as it is a mandatory characteristic. This is why “(None)” would result in an incomplete configuration.

Let’s turn on the trace and see what happens when we choose the value “Harsh Environment.” This choice triggers the execution of object dependencies because the values for Gripper Technology and Delicate Parts Handling have been determined (“Mechanical Gripper” and “No”), and the user can’t change them anymore.

The trace has a lot going on—68 entries have appeared, as we can see when scrolling down.

But we’re only interested in the entries starting with no. 8, where the user input is processed (our header material is RBT_VA_BUNDLE).

 

User Input

The details for position no. 9 show that the user assigned the value HARSH (the technical name for “Harsh Environment”) to the characteristic RBT_ENVIRONMENT of header material RBT_VA_BUNDLE.

The cogwheel symbols show us the values before the change (cogwheel with arrow pointing to the left) and after the change (arrow pointing to the right). Note that these symbols are only in place with high-level dependencies (as opposed to low-level dependencies for bill of materials (BOM) and routing explosion)! CTRLD is the technical name for “Controlled Environment.”

 

Constraint Execution, Part 1

In the next step, no. 10, the constraint named RBT_VAB_RESTRICT_GRIP_TECH is executed. The bifurcation symbol with the three connected tiny circles stands for “Object Dependency.” The number in round brackets indicates that the first restriction of the constraint is executed. Restrictions are separated by commas so you can see which part is addressed by the number. In our case, there are comments that number the restrictions sequentially.

According to the first restriction in the constraint, the value MECH is chosen by the constraint.

 

Constraint Execution, Part 2

Let’s have a closer look at the editor coding of the constraint. Scrolling down, we can see a second restriction:

This restriction determines that if fragile parts are handled (RBT_WP_FRAGILE = ‘YES’), the gripper must be of the vacuum type (VACM). As an implication, if RBT_GRIP_TECH does not have the value VACM, the characteristic RBT_WP_FRAGILE must have the value NO. This is because restrictions in constraints state general rules and enforce them like ‘laws of nature’ (if applicable, a condition part must be fulfilled upfront, which doesn’t exist here). When a restriction is formulated like “if A, then B,” it’s equivalent to the logical contrapositive “if not B, then not A.”

This being said, we expect the constraint to spring into action again: The characteristic RBT_GRIP_TECH for the grip technology has been set to MECH (i.e., not VACM) during the constraint's first execution, and therefore, RBT_WP_FRAGILE should be set to NO.

As you can tell from step 11 of the trace, this is precisely what happens:

The second restriction of the constraint is executed, picking the value NO for RBT_WP_FRAGILE because RBT_GRIP_TECH has been set to MECH.

 

Trace Filters

The Trace Filters option is a handy feature. You can access it with the funnel symbol button beside the search window.

The Trace Filters pop-up shows you five categories to find results in the trace log:

Trace Level

In the Trace Level, you can narrow your search to high-level or low-level configuration or leave it blank to see both. High-level dependencies are interactive dependencies, and low-level dependencies directly affect BOM and routing. Both can occur interleaved in multi-level models, e.g., when a sales order is validated.

Message Type

You can select one or more entries from this drop-down list. Several entries are connected by an OR logic, which means, e.g., the selection “Values Assignment” plus “Value Restriction” finds all entries where a value is assigned to a characteristic or the domain of values is restricted.

Value Assignment By

Values can be assigned by a user or automatically:

Characteristic

Here, you can enter the names of one or more characteristics using the F4 help.

Dependency

Choose one or more dependencies to look for.

 

Direct Navigation

In the tracing pane, you can directly select a material component, a characteristic, or a dependency. Clicking on an element gives you several options, such as filtering for it or inspecting it.

Let’s click on characteristic RBT_GRIP_TECH in trace entry no. 10, and then choose “Where this was changed”:

As a result, we get back entries no. 10 (again) and no. 61:

This possibility leads us to a best practice in case of an inconsistency: If an inconsistency occurs, search for the “Inconsistency Detected” message type. Then, take the characteristic that has become inconsistent and search upwards using “Where this was changed.”

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app g...
entry.content:
Thanks, Ian for the quick turn around. That seems to have fixed the problem. I'm able to generate a template-based Fiori app for OData v4 service now.

Just a side-note - For those who had downgraded the Fiori generator as per the suggested temporary workaround using 

npm i -g @sap/generator-fiori@1.15.7

would have to install the latest version manually even after restarting the dev space using

npm i -g @sap/generator-fiori

npm package list after restarting the dev space:

user: ########### $ npm -g list
/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib
└── @sap/generator-fiori@1.15.7

After installing the latest Fiori generator:

user: ############ $ npm i -g @sap/generator-fiori

changed 39 packages in 2s

9 packages are looking for funding
  run `npm fund` for details
Reshimming asdf nodejs...
user: ############ $ npm -g list
/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib
├── @sap/generator-fiori@1.16.1

In short, restarting the dev space does not auto-update to the latest Fiori generator if you had manually downgraded previously. You would have to upgrade manually.
Having said that, the latest Fiori generator(1.16.1) works fine for OData v4 services. @IanQuigley : Can you please confirm if the presence of /IWBEP/COMMON services is expected in the service selection list?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Manage Substitution/Validation Rules – Journal Entries: A Guide to Business Contexts and Rules

Shawn

entry.title: Measurement Document - Wrong Counter Reading difference reflected
entry.content:
Hello,

May I ask if someone may help explain why for one measuring point, when I enter a value in the Counter Reading, the calculated Counter Reading difference is correct whereas for the measuring point 12204, when I enter directly in the Counter Reading, the calculated Counter Reading difference is wrong.

For example, for measuring point 12203, when I enter in the Counter Reading, the difference is correct but for 12204, the difference calculated is wrong

12203

12204

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Consolidation of invesments - Multiple Investments in subs FS Item
entry.content: Hello Giulia, Can I ask what you did after you defined a new FS Item Role for each Investment and a new Elimination Selection which includes the new FS Item Roles you created? Where did you assign the new FS Item Role and the new Elimination Selection so that system generates value for C/I Activity field and performs elimination on them? (My customer also asked me to define an Investment FS Item for each Subsidiary.) Thank you in advance. Best Regards, Chen

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Threat Detection 2.0, SP07!
entry.content:
We are delighted to announce the release of SAP Enterprise Threat Detection 2.0 Support Package SP07 (Support Package Stack 51), which has been available to our customers since December 16, 2024. We are confident that this new support package will greatly enhance our customers’ security capabilities, providing peace of mind and robust defense against cyber threats.

SAP Enterprise Threat Detection remains the pioneering real-time security event management and monitoring solution specifically designed for SAP S/4HANA applications. It can be utilized both in the private cloud and on-premise. This advanced solution empowers companies using SAP software to swiftly identify and mitigate cyber-attacks in real time, preventing potential damage.

Our mission is to protect SAP S/4HANA applications and stop critical cyber-attacks, which are becoming more prevalent and targeting core business systems.

SAP Enterprise Threat Detection gives transparency into suspicious user behavior and anomalies in SAP business applications to identify and stop security breaches in real-time. Thereby, helping companies go beyond preventive measures and focus on real-time detection and response.

For those opting for the private cloud or on-prem solution, it can be delivered as a fully managed service by SAP or through our trusted partners. This state-of-the-art security monitoring service ensures customers don't need to invest in extensive internal security expertise or dedicated resources, allowing companies to focus on their core business operations while benefiting from top-tier security solutions.

Key Features and Business Value

The main features delivered with Support Package SP07 are:

Enhanced Alerts Filtering:

Security administrators can now find alerts more easily, filtering out non-critical alerts and focusing on the most relevant security threats. This leads to improved efficiency and faster response times, allowing security teams to concentrate on actionable items and reduce the noise from false positives.

Tightened Security Controls

Different users can have access to alerts based on their roles and responsibilities, ensuring that sensitive security information is accessible only to authorized personnel. This enhances the security posture of an organization by preventing unauthorized access to critical security data and ensuring compliance with internal and external regulations.

Transition to new ABAP Log Extractor Framework completed

(available since S/4HANA 2407, also read this article😞 Transitioning to the new framework allows customers to leverage the latest enhancements in log extraction, ensuring efficient and comprehensive monitoring.

Then improved log extraction capabilities enables a more robust and reliable security monitoring, leading to better detection and analysis of potential threats.

Support for New Logs Sources

Integration with additional log sources – SAP Analytics Cloud and Database table change logs – allows for a more holistic view of the security landscape and broader coverage on monitored activities.

  • SAP Analytics Cloud logs: Enhanced Security for Analytical Insights
  • Database table change logs: Comprehensive Monitoring of Critical Data Changes in Tables

This leads to a broader spectrum of monitored activities which improves the completeness and accuracy of threat detection.

New Patterns Added

The system is now capable of detecting additional security threats – mainly: alerts for unauthorized administrative actions and alerts for audit log tampering – which leads to enhanced overall security.

Additional Health Check Monitoring

The system can now monitor and alert administrators if there are any missing logs, which are crucial for forensic analysis and auditing. This ensures the integrity and completeness of security logs for more accurate threat detection and compliance purposes.

Automated Load-Based Refinement

with new configuration advisor report, to provide configuration recommendations and the ability to apply some of them automatically for log transfer from SAP NetWeaver AS for ABAP using ABAP Log Extraction (Legacy). This streamlines the configuration process, reducing administrative overhead and ensuring optimal performance of log extraction tasks.

Final Words

These enhanced features and capabilities provided with Support Package SP07, not only improve the detection and response mechanisms of SAP Enterprise Threat Detection, but also enhance the overall security and operational efficiency for our customers and service partners.

Where to find more?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTERPRISE_THREAT_DETECTION/7a82a717136348359c705f5b34015d27/7710ab4a63f449fc9b2103574ecb63da.html

Cheers,

Arndt

entry.title: Re: CPQ interactive drawings
entry.content:
Hi,

It isn't possible with the standard CPQ solution. It might be achieved through customization in CPQ, but this would require significant effort at the UI level (depending on the example). We can integrate CPQ with our partner's solutions for 3D/2D dynamic drawings, such as Expivi or CDS. The mentioned tools are already integrated into our demo landscape. Additionally, we might integrate CPQ with any other tool for dynamics drawings.

 

Regards

Stevica

entry.title: Re: Speical characters in PGP key user id not allowing in...
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no need to change the UID. Moreover, if a partner provides us with their PGP public key, you cannot change it.

A PGP UID (User ID) consists of three components: User Name (comment) <email>. Both the (comment) and <email> parts are optional.

In the Integration Suite, the managed key view displays all three components if they are defined. 

 

 

 

However, in the iFlow configuration, only the "User Name" part is required.

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app g...
entry.content: Hi Saurabh, it might take a little while for your dev space to update with the latest, but it should happen when the new version is released. Hopefully soon for customers, but thanks for mentioning the workaround. In terms of V4 services displayed, nothing should have changed here with the latest fix - the V4 list of services should be the same. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: CREATE button is not appearing after deployed Fiori A...
entry.content:
In BAS --> Page Map --> Check whether 'Creation Mode' is set to 'InlineCreationRows' for the respective table

Creation Mode:
The name property of TableCreationMode defines the creation mode; possible values are: -
NewPage: The create action leads to a new page. -
InlineCreationRows: No create button will be rendered, an empty row is directly given. -
Inline: The create action leads to a new row at the table (not recommended, use InlineCreationRows instead). The default is "NewPage".
 
Ensure that the mode is set to NewPage or Inline for the create button to be visible

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Workaround Needed for Free-hand SQL with DDL statements in Web Intelligence BO 4.3
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are in SAP BO 4.3 , Windows based, Single Node.

Now, we have few Free Hand SQL based reports to be developed which has DDL commands in those.

 Also we are aware, the SAP Note, which mentions DDL commands are not supported in SQL Panel (BI LaunchPad).  

2248236 - Free-hand SQL with DDL statements in Web Intelligence.

Can anyone please guide with an workaround to resolve this issue at the earliest?

Has anyone tried resolving this issue , please help with an approach.

Thank you , in advance , for reading,  coming forward and resolving this issue.

Regards,

Asit Mukherjee.

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app g...
entry.content: Hi Ian. Thanks. With 1.15.7 I did not see the /IWBEP/COMMON (0001) services in the list. They have started appearing 1.16.0 onwards.

entry.title: Extending a standard cds view with lineItem reference
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I am trying to extend a standard cds view with data retrived from an association and persent it as a lineItem in the object page of the standard app.
In RAP concept, the associated cds view should be exposed in the service definition to make it work as a targetElement. How to solve this problem if the Standard CDS view has been implemented by the old SEGW odata service ?

entry.title: Re: Are there any practice questions/papers to prepare fo...

Hi @ruth100 
Please access our SAP CERTIFICATION C_IBP SAP Certified Associate - SAP IBP for Supply Chain website. there you can find 

  • Please see below the list of topics that may be covered within this SAP Certification
  • How to prepare
  • FAQs 
  • Link to the sample questions

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Relaxed Flow not working in Work Center POD
entry.content: Hi, I clearly understand your requirements. However, this is definitely not what Relaxed Flow is used for. Above, I showed in detail what actually Relaxed Flow is for and how it works. I believe there is probably more than one way to address your requirement, you can evaluate running production orders in Order POD (see: https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/executing-discrete-production-orders-in-order-pod-within-sap-digital/ba-p/13562892) with 'Quantity Validation' as NO (see: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/routings-with-quantity-validation) and explore Any-Order Group Routing (see: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-any-order-group-routing), for example. In any case, Relaxed Flow is definitely NOT what you are looking for. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Not able create instances for SAP Process Integration Runtime
entry.content: hi @poornima11 , iam also facing the same issue .

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload using RAP: Part -3
entry.content:
I’m working on extending a Fiori element list report application to add file attachment functionality. While I’ve successfully added a function in the manifest file, I’m facing an issue where only the function defined in the manifest gets triggered. Other functions that I’ve written at the controller level are not being triggered.

Could you please provide guidance or suggest what might be missing in the configuration?

entry.title: Re: Issue with merging SFCs in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi,

I just tried simple SFC Split and then SFC Merge back in my system as you described, without any issues. Is this issue reproducible? I suggest you raise a ticket for detailed investigation in your system, as it´s impossible to tell much without checking your setup and step-by-step execution in detail. Hope it helps,

Manoel

entry.title: Re: How to create inbound api endpoint for SAP DMC
entry.content: Hi, just as a quick update, you should be able to call production processes via REST, using <url>+'/oauth/token', 'clientid' and 'clientsecret' values from the Service Key for OAUTH 2.0 client credential authentication, and 'public-api-endpoint' from the Service Key + 'URL / Path' field from Manage Service Registry app as URL. If my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as solution. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Problem to create inbound delivery in EWM first time
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

 

I'm facing this issue after the basic setting config for embeded EWM.

I'm getting error messages /BOPF/FRW012, /BOPF/FRW007, /BOPF/FRW013.

Someone has an idea how to solve this issue? there is some service pending to be active for EWM from basis side?

 

Thanks,

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Fixing pricing date by customer in Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear Dee

You can also customize your VK11 transaction, for your net price, where you can set the validity period per customer.

So if there you can handle different prices per customer and also per period, ok?

Lúcia

entry.title: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I need to change the status from TECO to CLSD for service orders. I am trying to use the, "BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN". I am not sure if the method CLOSE or CLOSED is available to close the order directly. If it is there, kindly give me an example to close the order using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN", or kindly suggest me other ways or possibilities.

entry.title: SAP Public cloud (Grow) - option to develop simple APPs
entry.content:
I'm currently on a SAP Cloud Public Edition (GROW) 

I want to create a simple app based on 2 or 3 standard CDS views. 
Initialy, I created Custom CDS API but this is not an option for creating application (CDS Api)

So I'd like to know if other customers have done limited dev (or APP) on a Public edition ?

An example of requirement : list of purchase requisition of a user (the business user can see only its purchase requisitions).

I'm a fullstack developer and I can adopt any solution. But I don't know what is possible in the particular case of Public cloud. We have access to Cloud foundry et SAP Build Work zone (not SAP Build access for the moment). Is there a scenario in Business Application Studio for that case ?

entry.title: Re: CDS view based on IBP system
entry.content: Dear Krishna, Were you able to finally figure a solution for your original requirement of being able to create CDS views based on IBP data ? Exploring solution for a similar requirement.

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I have been trying to redeemed my campaign code but I can not purchase the free attempt due to the error: "We are unable to provide invoice as a payment option at this point. Please contact SAP Accounts Receivable."  

I have followed the guide (clear cache, different devices) but it's not working. Also, I have sent the email to SAP Accounts Receivable - Singapore email address (as I have chosen Singapore as my region) but no reply. 

REQUEST : I want to make request to manually redeem my code on behalf of my account

PROGRAM NAME : is Digital Skills Initiative digitalskills@sap.com

Please your response will be of much help. 

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Re: Not able create instances for SAP Process Integration...

Hi poornima11 ,

Booster allows SAP Process Integration Runtime instances to be created only  in Singapore region not for US East (VA) region.

Regards,

Harini.

entry.title: Re: Screen Personas SP18 transport from one system to ano...
entry.content: Hello Tamas, thank you very much for your quick reply, I was able to test it so far and it worked well in the test cases 🙂 I just have one more question: is it possible, since a flavor already exists, to convert / integrate it somehow with adjustments etc. so that the flavor can be used?

entry.title: Re: Improve SAP Commerce Cloud performance with Read only DB
entry.content:
HI @NK19 

Thank you for your question : 

So basically read only url is not something different from your existing db.url.

Only difference is you have a read replica of your existing database which supports read only operations.

So your main db url will be like : 

db.url = jdbc:mysql://db-primary.company.local:3306/mydb

and readonly db url be like : 

db.url = jdbc:mysql://db-replica.company.local:3306/mydb

The value for db-primary.company.local and mydb can be obtained from your Data base administration team.

You can configure both the values using the properties.

entry.title: Voucher Code for Certification Attempt
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I’ve been trying to get in touch regarding the free certification attempt initiative. I’ve sent multiple emails to digitalskills@sap.com, but I haven’t received any response so far.

I’ve completed the required learning journey and urgently need support as the deadline (December 20, 2024) is fast approaching.

Could you please assist me in resolving this? I don’t want to miss out on this opportunity.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Reset All Personalization does not reset changes
entry.content:
I found the following solution which worked for me.

Posting it here for people who are still facing the same issue.

P.S: This will delete ALL the personalization that the user has saved (including Tiles order, new Sections, App specific settings). So please use it with caution and only if user is ok with this side effect. 

Solution:

Go to SU01 -> Personalization tab, and delete the following entries:

UI2 Personalization Container                         /UI2/CONTAINER
UI2 Favorites Personalization                          /UI2/FAV_DATA
UI2 User Profile Personalization                      /UI2/USER_PROFILE
Layered Repository personalization object      /UIF/LREP

Say Yes to the popup "Reset all data ?". 

 

Thank you. 
Arvind.

entry.title: Re: Not able create instances for SAP Process Integration...
entry.content:
Hi @harinidt ,
Thanks for your response
I am trying to create Api and Iflow instances manually its getting failed.

entry.title: Re: How to create Journal Entry voucher with project task assignment
entry.content: HI

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Scope Confirmation time
entry.content:
Hello @GAK1 

This process is usually completed instantly. However, there are instances where it might take longer than expected. In your case, I suggest raising an incident with SAP so they can investigate the issue further. I’ve encountered a similar situation in the past

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: How to create Journal Entry voucher with project task...
entry.content:
Hi,
You can use the following to include the project task in the JEV payload
<!-- Project Task-->

<FinancialAccountingViewOfProjectTaskReference> <FormattedID>C103313</FormattedID> <ObjectTypeCode>231</ObjectTypeCode> <ObjectNodeTypeCode>1020</ObjectNodeTypeCode> </FinancialAccountingViewOfProjectTaskReference>

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Handling SFC Status "Open" in SAP DM despite "Technic...
entry.content:
Hi, as you can see in the entries below:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/actions-based-on-order-status
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/updating-orders-before-release
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/updating-orders-after-release

TECO handling is currently only supported ootb in DM before Order Release, so you might evaluate custom developments for that.

Hope it clarifies,
Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Settlement does not recognize Downpayment of the prev...
entry.content: Hi, @micheledambrosio I'm glad to hear the issue is solved, we get some questions like this when customers use their own custom asset class. For AUC the flag should always be set. Can you mark the answer correct. Thanks Mark

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#fe-lrop-v4"
entry.content:
Hello,

I often get this error on starting the poetry slums manager app. Sometimes the app works though.

Does somebody know how to fix it?

Thank you

entry.title: mvt 309 in WM
entry.content:
hello Gurus.

my question is the following: I am relatively junior to WM so I need help with it.

I want to perform a material to material movement for material in a WM Sloc.

Basically, the correspondent of Mvt 309 in IM.

can someone tell me how to do that?

thank you and regards

Alisa

entry.title: ITSMobile - Zebra - Velocity browser
entry.content:
We are running some old RF devices on SAPConsole with Telnet and are using the solution from OSS note 371838 (NOTIFY_BELL_SIGNAL) to get a sound from the device.

We have also some Zebra MC330K running from SAP ITS. On this Android device we are running on the Velocity browser. IT has chosen this to lock down for unwanted features in the browser. But the result is that the old solution with sound don't work anymore.

Are somebody running this combination ?

The browser basically just supports the IDA Command IDA_BEEP and IDA_ERROR_BEEP

The only way to send this sound is by using code from this : https://help.ivanti.com/wl/help/de_DE/Velocity/1.1/Velocity/DevelopingPages/IDA_Commands.htm

Basically I have modified the SOUND.HTML that was added with ~ITSMOBILESOUNDINCLUDE

 

The sound.html looks like this 

<script type="text/javascript" language="javascript">
`if ( ( ~messageline != "" ) && ( ~itsmobilemsgsound == "1" ) || ( ~currdynpro.messagesound != "" ) )
if ( ~currdynpro.messagesound == "S" )
<!-- sucess message -->
` location.href = "ida:IDA_BEEP" ;
` elseif ( ~currdynpro.messagesound == "I" )
<!-- information message -->
` location.href = "ida:IDA_BEEP" ;
` elseif ( ~currdynpro.messagesound == "W" )
<!-- warning message -->
` location.href = "ida:IDA_ERROR_BEEP" ;
` elseif ( ~currdynpro.messagesound == "E" )
<!-- error message -->
` location.href = "ida:IDA_ERROR_BEEP" ;
` else
<!-- message type not set -->
` location.href = "ida:IDA_ERROR_BEEP" ;
` end;
end;`
</script>

I can't get "document.location" or "window.navigate" to give a sound. And the problem with "location.href" is that it displays a empty screen, when I have to use Back un the device to get back to the screen.

 

Has anyone a solution for this combination ?

entry.title: Re: Can user has user defined header/item condition in Sa...
entry.content:
Hello @Ravi_Mehta 

Yes, we can create and configure a new header or item condition type using the V/06 transaction code, tailored to meet the specific business requirements.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: CDS View with aggregation

entry.title: Register Now for Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package combining solutions, services, community support, and learnings to help businesses of all sizes successfully adopt cloud ERP. At its core lies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, our fully-fledged cloud ERP designed to optimize processes and drive intelligent, sustainable operations. 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series is a biannual event showcasing live sessions led by product experts. These sessions provide an exclusive preview of upcoming innovations, including AI-driven features and advancements with Joule, tailored to selected lines of business and industries. Spanning several days, the series offers expert demos, insider previews, and real-time Q&A, giving participants a first look at exciting updates and the opportunity to get their questions answered directly.

From January 21 to January 24, 2025, we'll start the year with 21 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you.

Agenda:

 

👉Don't miss this opportunity and register now! 

 

Sign-Up Instructions:

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to register for the live sessions and to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up​

  • As a customer:​ Access to at least the SAP Enterprise Support Edition is required. Follow these steps to sign up:​
    1. Navigate to the sign-up page and click on the “sign up” button.​
    2. Authenticate yourself with your S-user ID and password.​
    3. The system will check your eligibility, create a new SAP Learning Hub user, and populate your learning catalogue. This process may take up to 2 hours.​
    4. You will receive a registration confirmation via e-mail once the registration process is complete.​
  • As a partner: Partners can access the live sessions and recordings through the SAP Partner Edge Edition.​
    ​
  • As an SAP internal: Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge) by clicking on "access".​

Experiencing issues? Make sure to be logged on before registering. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Live Product Expert Sessions.

Find out more about our live product expert sessions here.

entry.title: Re: SQL Server 2022 not available in drop down
entry.content: Have you checked whether the required MSSQL 2022 ODBC driver version is installed?

entry.title: How to Handle Empty Data Arrays in MDK App to Prevent Crashes?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working on an MDK app and have encountered an issue where the app crashes when the data array is empty. Specifically, I've set clientData as the target for a data table, but when clientData is an empty array ([]), the app crashes upon opening the page. In previous MDK V24.7.5 if there is not data then data is not visible, but in mdk 24.11 if data table target value is empty then it is crashing.

Here are the steps I've taken so far:

  1. Ensured that the MDK app is updated to the latest version.
  2. Tried to implement data validation to check if the array is empty before binding it to the table.
  3. Added error handling to catch any exceptions during the data binding process.

Despite these efforts, the app still crashes when clientData is empty. Has anyone else faced a similar issue? How did you resolve it? Any suggestions or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help!

Note these balances carryforward from FY2022 to 2023 using tcode FAGLGVTR.

 

Any ideas.???

Thanks in advance.

Sha

entry.title: Error during provisioning SAP AI Core Instance
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to provision an AI Core Instance(free tier) in BTP as explained in tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ai-core-launchpad-provisioning..html.

I have admin rights but when I try to create the instance, I get error with description

Couldn't create an instance of service 'SAP AI Core' with plan 'free'
Service broker error: "Service" broker aicore-mlfproduction failed with: "plan_id" aicore-mlfproduction-free not found in the service catalog (check attachment).

How can we solve this?

Regards,
Sridhar

entry.title: Re: SQL Server 2022 not available in drop down

Downloading the correct driver worked.

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN
entry.content: Hmmm, not aware of being able to change an order that already has TECO status.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Discrete Orders - Sampling Requirements (dif...
entry.content: Hi @ppilvines1, this is not enough input to clearly understand your production process/flow, requirements, constraints and the level of shop floor automation and integration that you have available, if any. I can probably think of several ways to implement a sampling logic, from really simple to really complex, once again depending on your specific requirements. In general, you should be able to model data collections to reflect the different steps required and use Automatic Triggers to catch manual by workers and/or automatic by machines production events and trigger a PPD to check actual quantity versus sample rate for that specific manufacturing context, to either collect data automatically if possible, trigger an alert so workers can do it manually, or do something to block the SFC like place a hold, disposition or perhaps start a special operation to enforce the data collection before the SFC can proceed, if it´s not a continuous process, for example. Hope it helps somehow. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: BC SETs module PS (Project System)
entry.content: You can see all the BC sets in SPRO. You should not activate a BC set randomly, what kind of data are you looking for?

entry.title: Re: Can user has user defined header/item condition in Sa...
entry.content:
Hello @Ravi_Mehta 

This is the standard behavior of the system: within a single pricing procedure, you cannot activate multiple base price conditions simultaneously. For instance, if the system determines the PR00 condition type based on an existing condition record, and the user enters another base price condition in the sales order, the system will automatically deactivate the PR00 condition type and activate the new base price condition

Best Regards

Vivek Savant.

entry.title: Re: RE: CAP Java Documentation -- Copy & Modify CDS QL St...
entry.content:
++ Replace the where clause with another where condition:

CqnSelect copy = CQL.copy(query, new Modifier() {
   @Override
   public Predicate where(Predicate where) {
      return CQL.get("<column-name-from-entity>").in(["<val1>", "<val2>"]);
   }
})

 Filter out specific segments:

CqnSelect copy = CQL.copy(query, new Modifier() {
    @Override
    public Predicate comparison(Value<?> lhs, Operator op, Value<?> rhs) {
        if (lhs.isRef() && lhs.asRef().lastSegment().equals("<column-name>") {
            return CQL.constant(true).eq(CQL.constant(true));
        }
        return CQL.comparison(lhs, op, rhs);
    }
})

entry.title: Hi team, User is getting below message while running PPLA PO settlements in SAP. Can you help?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI : Sender SFTP channel not deleting file.
entry.content:
Hi Amit

I am also facing the same issue "Sender SFTP Adapter not deleting file" instead sending duplicate messages to the receiver system. Even though I have set the post-processing as "Delete" instead of deleting the files, sending the same file multiple times to the Receiver system.

Can you please help me to solve this issue?

Regards,
Shaik

entry.title: Re: Can user has user defined header/item condition in Sa...
entry.content:
Hello @Ravi_Mehta 

In the Control condition type control, there is a field called "Condition Class," which determines the nature of a pricing condition. The classifications are as follows:

  • B: Base Price
  • A: Discount
  • D: Taxes

and So On

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Hello I am Ramkumar
entry.content: I echo what my colleague @AnnePetteroe says and welcome you back to SAP Community @ramkry - look forward to seeing future engagements from your side. Please feel free to join any of our open groups and taking part in discussions - or start one of your own!

entry.title: Re: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#fe-lrop-v4"
entry.content: Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.Details: { "info": "Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent \"#fe-lrop-v4\"", "technicalMessage": "Error: adding object \"component\" with duplicate id 'application-fe-lrop-v4-component'\nError: Error: adding object \"component\" with duplicate id 'application-fe-lrop-v4-component'\n at https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:410:536\n at c.e [as register] (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:410:709)\n at https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:398:2734\n at c.constructor (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:398:2936)\n at c.constructor (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:446:2843)\n at c.constructor (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:748:662)\n at c.s [as constructor] (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap/fe/core/library-preload.js:11:4077)\n at new c (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:416:4419)\n at p (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:446:26522)\n at https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.15/resources/sap-ui-core.js:446:27859"}

Archie Oomen

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Daniel Mateo - December 2024 Edition
entry.content: Great interview, thanks for sharing all this information with other community members @DanielMateo !!

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract for Sales - Manual Delta Accruals
entry.content:
Dear,

Booking invoices appear to be a workaround to handle a common use case that is not covered by standard functionality. This issue is particularly critical in S/4HANA brownfield transformation projects, where closing rebates using the "old" functionality is not always feasible

Additionally, this approach may only be viable during the data migration phase, where we could use "fake" billing documents not posted to accounting. Otherwise, the turnover could be overstated. (Note: Ideally, we should be able to define business volume by selecting billing documents not posted to accounting. However, this introduces added complexity to the business volume selection criteria defined in the condition contract.)

This workaround cannot be proposed for day-to-day operations, as it would involve creating fake billing documents or updating the condition contract (CC) for REJ1 each time users post an unplanned manual delta accrual.

In conclusion, I believe we need a customized solution to effectively manage this use case.

Thank you

Michele

entry.title: Re: CL_BCS Creates folder in client's outlook for PDF print.
entry.content:
This issue got solved,

The actual issue is with acknowledge mails like “Your message has been delivered to the following recipients:” or “Not delivered” which will create unnecessary folder in Outlook I have used below values to suppress these Acknowledge mails/ Folders.

For CL_BCS class

lo_bcs->SET_STATUS_ATTRIBUTES( I_REQUESTED_STATUS = 'N'  ).   

For SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1 FM

  RECEIVERS-NOTIF_DEL  = ' '.
  RECEIVERS-NOTIF_NDEL = ' '.

entry.title: Re: Can user has user defined header/item condition in Sa...
entry.content:
Hello @Vivek_Savant : Thank you again.

If i go with your explanation then it makes sense that 2 bases price cannot exists. Hence HM00 will make PR00 deactivate. But if i use item condition type PN00 which has class type A (Discount), then it should deactivate only discount but as per SAP's explanation it will deactivate Price & discount both. Any help here?

entry.title: Re: Operator Alert Triggering and CIT creation
entry.content:
Hi Fançois!

Before use the trace we requested the files from the folders INVALID and COM_EXCEPTION, and it's possible to see that the informations below are empty:

default.userServiceIdentifier:string

default.serviceIdentifier:string

default.consumptionDate:date

default.contractId:string

Resending the same consumption, but not using the Alert Triggering on the charging, we have the CIT created.

entry.title: Re: Fetching Dependents information in Benefits for reimbursements and allowances
entry.content:
Hi,

I believe you can hide the fields while applying benefits using field level conditioning but post the application if you see the benefit in the enrolment object using view details link then inherently It will show the internal mdf page in which you can't hide fields.

My Suggestion would be to keep such benefits as reimbursements, wherein after frequency it will be renewed and in the claim history only Benefit name, status and claim amount will be visible which gives a holistic view as well.

Warm Regards

Harpreet Chawla

entry.title: How to read contents of a file in RAP action
entry.content:
I have a RAP entity with an action, and I want to read the contents of a file present on application server and convert it into type XSTRING. 

I am using managed behavior implementation, and the service binding is of type Web API as the frontend is built separately. I have seen blogs on using the annotation @Semantics.largeObject but I am not sure how it will work as I am using an abstract entity as input for the RAP action

Highly appreciate any guidance or feedback on the same.

entry.title: Notes are not shown for OutboundDeliveries in OData API
entry.content:
After creating an OData service  to extract the notes (like Customer Information) from OutboundDelivery, and for this the TextCollection was used.But for OutboundDelivery you only get empty responses although notes are there.

 

We have thoroughly checked, notes usage is not available in custom OData even though all nodes are PSM released.

From our framework side this integration ( notes option is not available via custom odata) is not yet designed.

entry.title: CDS : How to define analytical query using two structures
entry.content:
This blog is about how to use two structures in CDS analytical query as in BW query.

The structure forms the foundational layout of the axes (rows or columns) in a data table, determining how information is organized and presented.
Structural components of key figure structures are always based on the key figure selections (basic key figures, restricted key figures, and calculated key figures). Characteristic structural components cannot contain key figure selections.

The arrangement of the structure affects the order and quantity of key figures or characteristics displayed in the rows and columns of a query or report.

Example: BW Query with Characteristic structure and Key Figure structure

In Analytical query, elements can be assigned to characteristics structure using @AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true. Element with measures get automatically assigned to measure structure.

Formulas can be defined for both characteristic structure and measure structure. The operands of a formula must be elements of the same structure to which the formula belongs. Operands of the other structure are not allowed.

If an analytical query has two structures (a measure and a characteristic structure), then the query result is a grid. Each cell in this grid is defined by an element of the measure structure and one of the characteristic structures. Restrictions are combined with AND. If both elements are formulas, the formula of the measure structure is calculated by default. Also, other properties like scaling, decimals are taken from the element of the measure structure by default. If this should be different, @AnalyticsDetails.query.collisionHandling annotation is used.

  collisionHandling:

      { formula        : String( 20) enum { DEFAULT; THIS; CONCURRENT; };

        decimals       : String( 20) enum { DEFAULT; THIS; CONCURRENT; };

        scaling        : String( 20) enum { DEFAULT; THIS; CONCURRENT; };

        semanticObject : String( 20) enum { DEFAULT; THIS; CONCURRENT; };

      };

Example:

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS Query with 2 Structures'
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #ANALYTICAL_QUERY ]

define transient view entity ZLR_2STRUCT_CELL_REF_SIMPLE
provider contract analytical_query
as projection on ZOQ_FLIGHT
{

//----Elements of Key Figure structure
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@EndUserText.label: 'Max Capacity Economy'
seatsmax,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@EndUserText.label: 'Occupied Economy'
seatsocc,


@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@EndUserText.label: 'Percentage'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.decimals: 5
seatsocc / seatsmax * 100 as percentage,


//---Elements of Characteristics Structure

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@EndUserText.label: 'Calender Year 2019'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
case when flyear = '2019' then 1 else null end as year2019,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@EndUserText.label: 'Calender Year 2020'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
case when flyear = '2020' then 1 else null end as year2020,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@EndUserText.label: 'Diffenece 2019-2020'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
@AnalyticsDetails.query.decimals: 2
@AnalyticsDetails.query.collisionHandling: {decimals: #THIS}
 $projection.year2019 -  $projection.year2020 as difference

}

 

Output: 

To display structure element in a hierarchy, AnalyticsDetials.query.elementHierarchy.parent and @AnalyticsDetails.query.elementHierarchy.initiallyCollapsed annotations are used in CDS.

Example:

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS Query with 2 Structures'
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #ANALYTICAL_QUERY ]

define transient view entity ZLR_2STRUCT_CELL_REF_HIER
provider contract analytical_query
as projection on ZOQ_FLIGHT
{

//----Elements of Key Figure structure
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@EndUserText.label: 'Max Capacity Economy'
seatsmax,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@EndUserText.label: 'Occupied Economy'
seatsocc,


@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@EndUserText.label: 'Percentage'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.decimals: 5
seatsocc / seatsmax * 100 as percentage,


//---Elements of Characteristics Structure

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@EndUserText.label: 'Calender Year 2019'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.elementHierarchy.parent: 'difference'
case when flyear = '2019' then 1 else null end as year2019,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@EndUserText.label: 'Calender Year 2020'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.elementHierarchy.parent: 'difference'
case when flyear = '2020' then 1 else null end as year2020,

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@EndUserText.label: 'Diffenece 2019-2020'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure: true
@AnalyticsDetails.query.decimals: 2
@AnalyticsDetails.query.collisionHandling: {decimals: #THIS}
@AnalyticsDetails.query.elementHierarchy.initiallyCollapsed: true  
$projection.year2019 -  $projection.year2020 as difference

}

 

Output: 

 

After Expanding Hierarchy

Reference:

Working with Structures

entry.title: where can we get the connector.pgp.secret.keyring=*****connector.pgp.passphrase=*****
entry.content:
we are trying to encrpty and decrypt using pgp and the file is encrypted using the public key shared from securoty centre to the 3rd paarty team

where can we get the 

connector.pgp.secret.keyring=
connector.pgp.passphrase=

will it suffice if we pass the public key creatd and shared if we use it connector.pgp.public.keyring or it need to be converted to specific format to be used in connector ?

entry.content:
Hi All, Anyone got solution to the above issue? We are getting exactly same issue with deployed UI5 app from Build Work Zone.

Thanks & Regards,

Raja Sekhar K

entry.title: How to post an Accounting Document with multiple currency codes
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've a requirement to post an Accounting Document via BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST with multiple currency codes line items.

Ex: Below line items should be posted as a single document.

Transaction CurrencyAmount in TCLocal CurrencyAmount in LC
USD17.25KRW25000
AED63.36KRW25000
SGD46.87-KRW50000-

But I'm getting error that USD 17.25 is not balanced, however the local currency amount is balanced.

Expecting a suitable solution to achieve the same.

Regards,

Raja

entry.title: Re: Adobe form - Formcalc/Javascript How can we get the l...
entry.content:
For the benefit of all here is the solution applied.

1. We need a flowed empty subform between the "frm_Signature" and the previous subform

  • subform "frm_Detail"
  • subform "frm_Filler"
  • subform "frm_Signature"

2.  At the event "ready:layout" of the "frm_Signature" subform add the following Javascript

var subform = "frm_Signature" ;
var position = 190 ; // Desire bottom position in mm 
var page = xfa.layout.absPageCount() - 1 ;
var objs = xfa.layout.pageContent(page, "subform") ;
for (var i=0; i<objs.length; i++) {
   var som = objs.item(i).somExpression ;
   if ( som.indexOf(subform) != -1 ){
      var object = objs.item(i);
      break;
   }
}
var objectH = xfa.layout.h( object, "mm" );   
var objectY = xfa.layout.y( object, "mm" );
if ( ( objectY + objectH ) < position ) {
   this.parent.frm_Filler.h = position - ( objectY + objectH ) + "mm";  // Assign height of frm_Filler
   xfa.layout.relayout();
}

This will assign the height of the "frm_Filler" subform and relaunch the layout process.

entry.title: Re: Fetching Dependents information in Benefits for reimbursements and allowances
entry.content:
Thank you for your reply, Harpreet!

My concern was exactly about the MDF object, because all the created fields will be visible for any benefits (including the ones which don't have Dependent).

Congratulations on your post!
